name: Commander Ravier
description: Commander Ravier leads the Imperial Army’s division of Black Priors. Skilled in combat as they are brutal, their blades unforgiving. With their faces hidden upon induction, Commander Ravier leads these acolytes in the name of the Empire. Her sword and shield knows no mercy for the wicked hearted and for all those who stand against her and the Great Empire.
creator: Mono7893
